content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 21, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 21, 2026, focused on expanding the LifeOps ecosystem, improving core prompt handling for diverse LLMs, and maintaining dependency health. Significant updates were made to scheduling and calendar actions, alongside infrastructure improvements for agent reliability.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**LifeOps and Agent Infrastructure Enhancements**
*   Expanded `app-lifeops` with new actions for calendar management, travel booking, and cross-platform gateway support, including travel-time buffers and scheduling triggers ([#6984](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6984)).
*   Restored scenario final-check handlers with improved channel/action matching and integrated `installTaskHeartbeat` into swarm synthesis ([#6972](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6972)).

**Core Logic and Compatibility Improvements**
*   Added `PROMPT_OUTPUT_FORMAT` environment variable to support models like Gemini 2.5 Pro and Llama that struggle with default TOON encapsulation ([#6978](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6978)).
*   Updated `InMemoryDatabaseAdapter` to sort memories in descending order, ensuring consistency with `plugin-sql` ([#7000](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7000)).

**Dependency and Maintenance Updates**
*   Performed extensive dependency updates across the repository, including `vitest` ([#6982](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6982), [#6990](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6989)), `bun` ([#6973](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6973)), and various Rust crates like `tokio` and `reqwest` ([#6986](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6986), [#6985](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6985)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Dependency Management:** A series of PRs were opened to update dependencies, including `typescript` ([#6996](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6996)), `typedoc` ([#6995](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6995)), `tsup` ([#6994](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6994)), `vitest` ([#6997](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6997)), and various SDKs ([#6999](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6999), [#7001](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7001), [#7002](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7002)).
*   **Python/Rust Updates:** PRs for `python-dotenv` ([#7005](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7005)), `uuid` ([#6998](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6998)), and general `uv`/`pip` group updates ([#7003](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7003), [#7004](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7004)).
*   **Android:** Update for `androidx.coordinatorlayout` ([#7006](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/7006)).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Project Proposals and Feature Requests**
*   **Agent Commerce:** The proposal for Merxex integration was closed following maintainer feedback ([#6977](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6977)).
*   **PII Sanitization:** A request for a PII sanitization layer before LLM processing was closed ([#7007](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7007)).

## NEW ISSUES
*   **PII Sanitization:** A request was submitted to implement a PII sanitization layer to protect user data before it reaches LLM providers ([#7007](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7007)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues with more than 3 comments were identified for this reporting period.*
